_skipReasons._doc: Reference list of common skip reasons for documentation purposes
_skipReasons.no-maven: Sample requires Maven project structure (pom.xml) not present
_skipReasons.no-main-class: Java sample has no identifiable main class
_skipReasons.maven-deps-offline: Sample requires Maven dependencies not available offline
_skipReasons.platform-specific: Sample uses platform-specific APIs not available in CI
_skipReasons.missing-sdk: Required SDK or runtime not installed

_examples._doc: Example entries showing skip and assertion patterns

java.skipReason: Requires Maven dependencies (okhttp, gson) — use mvn project with pom.xml

csharp.skipReason: Requires NuGet packages not bundled in sample
